channel.title: Design on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Design on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Apple's 20th iPhone: Single Slab
item.description: Apple's 20th anniversary iPhone design vision, a single slab of glass, is nearing reality with Liquid Glass prep

item.title: Ikea Design Chief Reveals His Personal Product Favorites
item.description: Ikea's design chief Johan Ejdemo shares which products he personally owns and why, revealing insights into the brand's aesthetic and functional philosophy.
